text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the scrimmage against the veteran trainer has arrived.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad you came today to support me, Tamtam.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Ya don't gotta pat my head every time ya see me!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But anyway, 'course I'd come. We trained together this whole time, so
ya better show me some results!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You got it!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: How are you feeling, Trainer? Feeling nervous?
choice_data_list: I should be the one asking you that question...
I should be the one asking you that question...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You know best, but I can't help worrying about you a little.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I feel great though, because I know you're behind me all the way.

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Good morning, Rookie and Super Creek. It looks like you've done
your training accordingly.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Good morning. I look forward to today's race.

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
You're taking this quite casually. I suppose this means you're fully
ready to join my team.
choice_data_list: Super Creek isn't going to lose.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, when did you become so bold? ♪

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I-I can see that you two are close, but that relationship ends today. I
already have Super Creek's new training plan ready.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With unwavering confidence, the veteran trainer walks away.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've finished saying hello, why don't we go ahead and get
ready ourselves?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Even though today's race isn't official, I'll be sure to grab our first win.
Think of it as a little present from me.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yup! I'm gonna give it all I have! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the race between Super Creek and the veteran trainer's racer
begins.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... As I expected, she's pretty fast.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But I won't let my trainer and Tamtam's efforts go to waste!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek accelerates to a breakneck pace despite it only being
the first half of the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This is just like at the tryouts, but somehow she's running even faster.

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text:
She's not even at the halfway mark, but she's already breaking into a
sprint?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Nah, ya just don't get it. That's not a sprint—it's her runnin' style. She
always had the skills to make her debut whenever she wanted.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The whole reason she hasn't debuted yet is 'cause her trainer was
lookin' out for her.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Bein' as she's not in great shape right now.

text_block_list.name: First-rate Trainer
text_block_list.text: You're saying this isn't her peak condition?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Da heck, ya didn't know?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
She wasn't doin' well for a few days since you became her trainer...
Well, I s'pose you wouldn't know, since she's not the type to tell
anyone. She doesn't like worryin' people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This whole time, I thought it was my inability as a rookie to create a
suitable training plan. Little did I know that she's been struggling...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...But ya did switch up her trainin', yeah? It made her real happy. Kept
tellin' me how you were growin' day by day.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
In the end, any mistakes you made with your plan don't matter. What's
most important is that you care 'bout her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I still can't escape the nagging feeling that she's been caring for
me far more than I've been able to care for her!
choice_data_list:
I promise I'm gonna be the best and most
reliable trainer for you!

I promise I'm gonna be the best and most
reliable trainer for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gathering all of my feelings, I shout across the field with all my might
at Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh my, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna win so I can keep giving you all the attention you need!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Super Creek finishes far ahead of her opponent and
grabs the win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A little while later...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I'm actually kind of nervous now that my debut race is
approaching.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, we can't have that now. Everything is going to be just fine,
Trainer. You're doing such a great job.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Once I debut, I'm going to bring home all the trophies for us. I'll show
everyone what a wonderful trainer you are.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I promise I'll take good care of you, okay? ♪
